channel.title: Slack-Bot on Console Labs
channel.description: Recent content in Slack-Bot on Console Labs

item.title: Mochi Raycast Extension
item.author: han@console.so (Han Ngo)
item.description:
Overview

We want to create a new Slack version of Mochi tip bot

Features for MVP

  • /deposit
  • /tip
    • : @username, #channel
    • : support integer and decimal
    • : Cryptocurrencies symbol
  • /withdraw
  • /ticker

Interface

  • /deposit

    • Help menu: when users enter only /deposit

      *private mode

      :moneybag: Deposit Tokens

To deposit tokens into your Slack account, use the following command:
/deposit <token>
/deposit eth
:one: Replace <token> with the token symbol you want to deposit.
:two: Then Mochi Bot will send you addresses to deposit.
:three: Finally, Send tokens from your crypto wallet into of of the given addresses

    • Deposit Addresses
